prompt: A realistic candid smartphone flash photo in a crowded bar, vertical 3:4 composition. Center the shot on an extremely attractive adult woman with long dark brown wavy hair, light tan skin, and a confident casual nightlife presence, wearing a fitted ribbed white tank top. Her face is mostly front-facing and slightly tilted, with a natural candid pose. She is holding up her left hand close to the camera and clearly showing exactly four fingers, thumb tucked in. In her right hand she holds a stemmed wine glass filled with very dark red wine almost completely to the brim, with no visible empty space at the top. The framing is mid-torso portrait, shot at close range like a spontaneous iPhone bar photo with direct flash, realistic skin texture, slight shine, strong foreground illumination, and darker ambient background. Behind her, mount a large round wall clock on a wooden column in the upper right area of the frame, and make the clock clearly read exactly 5:00. The bar environment should look busy and authentic, with warm dim lighting, blurred patrons, liquor signage, and subtle party leftovers on the bar counter. Show exactly 4 types of party remnants: empty glasses, used napkins, metallic confetti pieces, and drink straws. Include a few hanging balloons and streamers in the background, plus a cozy nightlife atmosphere with cluttered surfaces and reflections. Photorealistic smartphone aesthetic, candid nightlife snapshot, slight messiness, true-to-life proportions, accurate hands and fingers, accurate glass shape, accurate clock hands.
